SHT 02

Profile

SCALE — NTS

I'm a Salesforce Developer and Administrator with more than five years in the ecosystem, currently building at Raise Philippines Inc. My work spans custom development, declarative automation, and bi-directional integrations with external platforms.

Before Salesforce, I was a licensed Electronics Engineer designing telecom infrastructure — OSP, IBS, and OLT networks. That background shapes how I build software: measure first, design deliberately, document everything.

I care about solutions that are scalable, governed, and maintainable — from efficient SOQL to clean deployment pipelines with Copado and Gearset.
